detail.description:
▶ Plenty of rewards await!
Claim up to 100 Limited Recruitment Tickets!

▮New Players Up to 1,000 Free Recruits!

The Action Anime, OUTERPLANE

◎ The revenge saga of an Earthling summoned to another world commences! Summoned to "Mirsha," Earthling "K" pledges vengeance against betrayers, setting forth on a journey with the automaton "Eva"... The riveting tale of intertwined destinies begins to unfold.

▮ Dazzling Action ▮
Endless Turn-Based strategic excellence with skill chains and burst system
detail.recentChanges:
1. 3rd Anniversary Festival
2. New Limited Hero - [Midnight Rush Skadi]
3. New Event Dungeon - [The Price of a Perfect Heist]
4. Side Story Revamp & Rapport System Added for Select Heroes
5. Real-Time Arena
6. Joint Challenge – [Defeat the Annihilator]
7. Battle Pass: Ace Accomplice Rey
8. New Packages Added
9. Other Improvements and Bug Fixes

eventMentions.text: in addition to what i previously said, i know they will ignore this comment just like everyone else'
i am a very... strict gacha player. i get bored easily. but this game is it. i love the music. the a
3rd anniversary and still tons of bugs and freezing at end of battles.
i am ashamed i only found this game while it's celebrating its 3rd anniversary. solid game, peak wai
